title: hibiscus xanthium
intro: Hibiscus xanthium, also known as Yellow Hibiscus or Yellow Mallow, is a perennial plant species within the Hibiscus family. It is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits are numerous and include lowering blood pressure, reducing the risk of heart disease, and acting as a natural diuretic. Hibiscus xanthium can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed as a refreshing beverage or used to support overall well-being.
